items.name: TEMPO-Tumor-Ecosystem-Modeling-for-Predictive-Outcomes-
items.description: TEMPO establishes a clinically grounded, mechanistic, and predictive modeling framework that integrates spatial single-cell data with systems biology and machine learning to advance precision oncology in TNBC.
